# STRAT.046 ? Eisenhower Matrix

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** decision_making_frameworks
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Urgent/important matrix; four quadrants; do, schedule, delegate, eliminate; focus on important not just urgent; time management

## Application
Categorize by urgent/important; do Q1 (urgent+important); schedule Q2 (important); delegate Q3 (urgent); eliminate Q4; prioritize Q2

## Key Values
- Importance focus
- Urgency awareness
- Prioritization
- Delegation
- Elimination

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, decision_making_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
